data.title: Projects
data.description:
Public Skills Australia is developing training products related to skills and capability priorities defined in the Workforce Plan, with support from key stakeholders from the Government and Public Safety Industry-Sectors.

The Annual Training Product Development Plan and Annual Implementation, Promotion and Monitoring Plan, accessible within our individual project pages, details approved project activities for 2025 and 2026. This plan outlines the development of training products and specifically addresses changes to training package products, such as updates, reviews, and creation of new products.
